Title: Valid Login
Objectives: Verify an approved, active user can log in and reach their dashboard.
Prerequisites: User account is approved and active.
Test Steps:
1. Open the login page.
2. Enter a valid CTU ID and password.
3. Click Sign In.
Test Data: CTU ID + password of an approved active user
Expected Results: Login succeeds and the user is redirected to their role dashboard (Admin / Treasurer / Professor / Student).
Actual Results: Login succeeds and the user is redirected to their role dashboard (Admin / Treasurer / Professor / Student).
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the user is logged in and redirected to the correct dashboard.

Title: Login Missing Fields
Objectives: Verify the CTU ID and password are required.
Test Steps:
1. Leave the CTU ID or password blank.
2. Click Sign In.
Expected Results: Alert: "Please enter your CTU ID and password"; the request is not sent.
Actual Results: Alert: "Please enter your CTU ID and password"; the request is not sent.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if login is blocked when a field is empty.

Title: Login Invalid Credentials
Objectives: Verify wrong credentials are rejected.
Test Steps:
1. Enter a non-existent CTU ID or a wrong password.
2. Click Sign In.
Expected Results: Error: "Invalid CTU ID or password."
Actual Results: Error: "Invalid CTU ID or password."
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if invalid credentials are rejected.

Title: Login With Pending Account
Objectives: Verify a not-yet-approved account cannot log in.
Prerequisites: Account exists but is still Pending.
Test Steps:
1. Enter the pending account's credentials.
2. Click Sign In.
Test Data: CTU ID + password of a pending account
Expected Results: Error: "Your account is not yet approved. Please wait for admin approval."
Actual Results: Error: "Your account is not yet approved. Please wait for admin approval."
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the pending account is blocked.

Title: Login With Deactivated Account
Objectives: Verify a deactivated account cannot log in.
Test Steps:
1. Enter the deactivated account's credentials.
2. Click Sign In.
Test Data: CTU ID + password of a deactivated account
Expected Results: Error: "Your account has been deactivated. Please contact the administrator."
Actual Results: Error: "Your account has been deactivated. Please contact the administrator."
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the deactivated account is blocked.

Title: Login Lockout After Repeated Failures
Objectives: Verify repeated failed logins temporarily lock the account.
Test Steps: 1. Enter a wrong password repeatedly until the limit triggers.
Test Data: Same CTU ID, repeated wrong password
Expected Results: Error: "Account temporarily locked. Try again in 15 minutes."
Actual Results: Error: "Account temporarily locked. Try again in 15 minutes."
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the account is temporarily locked after repeated failures.

Title: Valid Student Registration
Objectives: Verify a prospective student can self-register through the full sign-up and email-verification flow.
Prerequisites: Registration page is accessible; the CTU ID and email are unused.
Test Steps:
1. Open Sign Up.
2. Fill name, CTU ID, email, password (matching confirm), course, year level, and section.
3. Choose a profile picture.
4. Click Sign Up.
5. Enter the 6-digit code emailed.
6. Click Verify & Create Account.
Test Data:
CTU ID: 2021-00123
Email: juan@email.com
Password: Passw0rd!
Course / Year / Section
Avatar: photo.jpg
Expected Results: CTU ID check passes; "Code sent to your email."; after verifying, "Email verified successfully."; account created with status Pending (awaiting approval); avatar uploaded; success overlay shown.
Actual Results: CTU ID check passes; "Code sent to your email."; after verifying, "Email verified successfully."; account created with status Pending (awaiting approval); avatar uploaded; success overlay shown.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the account is created as Pending after email verification.

Title: Registration Missing CTU ID
Objectives: Verify the CTU ID (Student ID) field is required.
Test Steps:
1. Leave the CTU ID blank.
2. Fill the remaining fields validly.
3. Click Sign Up.
Expected Results: CTU ID field is flagged; message: "Please fill in all required fields."
Actual Results: CTU ID field is flagged; message: "Please fill in all required fields."
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if registration is blocked and the CTU ID field is flagged.

Test Steps:

2. Fill the remaining fields validly.
3. Click Sign Up.

Actual Results: Name field is flagged; message: "Please fill in all required fields."
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if registration is blocked and the name field is flagged.

Objectives: Verify the email field is required.

Actual Results: Email field is flagged; message: "Please fill in all required fields."
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if registration is blocked and the email field is flagged.

Expected Results: Email field is flagged; message: "Please enter a valid email address."

Objectives: Verify the password must meet the complexity policy.
Test Steps:

2. Fill the remaining fields validly.
3. Click Sign Up.
Expected Results: Password field is flagged; message: "Password must be at least 8 characters and include uppercase, lowercase, a number, and a special character."
Actual Results: Password field is flagged; message: "Password must be at least 8 characters and include uppercase, lowercase, a number, and a special character."
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if registration is rejected for the weak password.

Test Steps:
1. Enter a valid password.
2. Enter a different confirm password.
3. Click Sign Up.
Expected Results: Confirm-password field is flagged; message: "Passwords do not match."
Actual Results: Confirm-password field is flagged; message: "Passwords do not match."
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if registration is rejected when the passwords differ.

1. Fill all fields validly.
2. Do not choose a profile picture.
3. Click Sign Up.
Expected Results: Message: "Please upload a profile picture."; registration does not proceed.
Actual Results: Message: "Please upload a profile picture."; registration does not proceed.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if registration is blocked when no picture is chosen.

Title: Registration Missing School Information

3. Click Sign Up.
Expected Results: The blank school-info field is flagged; message: "Please fill in all required fields."
Actual Results: The blank school-info field is flagged; message: "Please fill in all required fields."
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if registration is blocked for missing school information.

Title: Registration Duplicate CTU ID
Objectives: Verify a CTU ID already registered cannot be reused.
Prerequisites: An account with the same CTU ID already exists.
Test Steps:
1. Enter an existing CTU ID with otherwise valid details.
2. Click Sign Up.
Expected Results: Alert: "Registration failed: CTU ID is already registered."; the verification code is NOT sent.
Actual Results: Alert: "Registration failed: CTU ID is already registered."; the verification code is NOT sent.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the duplicate CTU ID is rejected before OTP.

Title: Registration Duplicate Email

Prerequisites: An account already uses the same email.
Test Steps:
1. Enter valid details with an in-use email.
2. Click Sign Up (CTU ID check passes, then the code send runs).
Expected Results: Message: "Email already registered."; verification does not start.
Actual Results: Message: "Email already registered."; verification does not start.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the duplicate email is rejected.

Title: Registration Verification Code Sent
Objectives: Verify a verification code is emailed after the form passes validation.
Prerequisites: Registration page is accessible; CTU ID and email are unused.
Test Steps:
1. Complete the form with valid details.
2. Click Sign Up.
Expected Results: Message: "Code sent to your email."; a 6-digit code is emailed and expires in 10 minutes.
Actual Results: Message: "Code sent to your email."; a 6-digit code is emailed and expires in 10 minutes.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if a code is sent and the confirmation message is shown.

Title: Registration Verify Correct Code
Objectives: Verify a correct, unexpired code completes verification and registration.
Prerequisites: A valid unexpired code was emailed.
Test Steps:
1. Enter the correct code.
2. Click Verify & Create Account.
Expected Results: Message: "Email verified successfully."; the account is then created with status Pending.
Actual Results: Message: "Email verified successfully."; the account is then created with status Pending.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the correct code completes registration.

Title: Registration Verify Wrong Code
Objectives: Verify an incorrect code is rejected.

2. Click Verify & Create Account.

Actual Results: Message: "Invalid code."
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the wrong code is rejected.

2. Click Verify & Create Account.

Actual Results: Message: "Code has expired."

Title: Registration Resend Verification Code
Objectives: Verify the user can request a new verification code.
Test Steps: 1. Click the Resend link on the verification screen.
Expected Results: A new code is emailed; message: "Code sent to your email."
Actual Results: A new code is emailed; message: "Code sent to your email."
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if a new code is sent on resend.

Title: Registration Invalid Profile Picture Type
Objectives: Verify the avatar upload rejects non-image file types.
Test Steps: 1. Complete the form and verification with a non-image profile picture chosen.
Expected Results: Avatar upload is rejected with "Only JPG, PNG, or WEBP images are allowed."
Actual Results: Avatar upload is rejected with "Only JPG, PNG, or WEBP images are allowed."
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the non-image avatar is rejected.
Comments: Note: the account is created first, then the avatar upload fails (the page does not validate avatar type/size up front).

Title: Professor Sign-Up Rate Limiting
Objectives: Verify repeated sign-up attempts are throttled.
Prerequisites: Several repeated sign-ups from the same IP and CTU ID.
Test Steps: 1. Submit the sign-up repeatedly from the same IP/CTU ID until the limit triggers.
Test Data:
Same CTU ID and IP
Many attempts
Expected Results: Server returns "Too many signup attempts. Please wait 15 minutes before trying again."
Actual Results: Server returns "Too many signup attempts. Please wait 15 minutes before trying again."
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if further attempts are blocked for 15 minutes.

Title: Forgot Password Request (Valid ID)
Objectives: Verify a reset code is sent for a known Student ID.
Prerequisites: An account with the given CTU ID exists and has an email.
Test Steps:
1. Open Forgot Password.
2. Enter the Student ID (CTU ID).
3. Submit.
Expected Results: Generic message: "If that ID exists, a verification code has been sent to the registered email."; a 6-digit code is emailed and the code-entry screen opens.
Actual Results: Generic message: "If that ID exists, a verification code has been sent to the registered email."; a 6-digit code is emailed and the code-entry screen opens.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if a code is sent and the generic message is shown.

Title: Forgot Password Request (Unknown ID)
Objectives: Verify an unknown ID returns the same message (no account enumeration).
Test Steps:
1. Open Forgot Password.
2. Enter an unknown Student ID.
3. Submit.
Expected Results: Same generic message: "If that ID exists, a verification code has been sent to the registered email."; no indication the ID does not exist.
Actual Results: Same generic message: "If that ID exists, a verification code has been sent to the registered email."; no indication the ID does not exist.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the response does not reveal whether the account exists.

Title: Forgot Password Missing ID
Objectives: Verify the Student ID is required.
Test Steps:
1. Leave the Student ID blank.
2. Submit.
Expected Results: Alert: "Please enter your student ID"; the request is not sent.
Actual Results: Alert: "Please enter your student ID"; the request is not sent.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the request is blocked when the ID is empty.

Title: Verify Reset Code (Correct)
Objectives: Verify a correct, unexpired reset code is accepted.
Prerequisites: A valid unexpired reset code was emailed.
Test Steps:
1. Enter the correct 6-digit code.
2. Submit.
Expected Results: Message: "Code verified. You can now reset your password."; the reset-password screen opens.
Actual Results: Message: "Code verified. You can now reset your password."; the reset-password screen opens.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the correct code is accepted.

Title: Verify Reset Code (Wrong)
Objectives: Verify an incorrect reset code is rejected.
Test Steps:
1. Enter an incorrect code.
2. Submit.
Expected Results: Message: "Invalid or expired verification code."
Actual Results: Message: "Invalid or expired verification code."
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the wrong code is rejected.

Title: Verify Reset Code (Expired)
Objectives: Verify a code older than 15 minutes is rejected.
Prerequisites: A reset code older than 15 minutes exists.
Test Steps:
1. Enter the now-expired code.
2. Submit.
Expected Results: Message: "Invalid or expired verification code."
Actual Results: Message: "Invalid or expired verification code."
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the expired code is rejected.

Title: Verify Reset Code (Not 6 Digits)
Objectives: Verify the code must be 6 digits.
Test Steps:
1. Enter a code that is not 6 digits.
2. Submit.
Expected Results: Alert: "Verification code must be 6 digits"; the request is not sent.
Actual Results: Alert: "Verification code must be 6 digits"; the request is not sent.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if a non-6-digit code is blocked client-side.

Title: Reset Password (Valid)
Objectives: Verify a verified user can set a new compliant password.
Test Steps:
1. Enter a new compliant password and matching confirm.
2. Submit.
Expected Results: Message: "Password reset successfully. You can now log in."; the user is returned to the sign-in screen.
Actual Results: Message: "Password reset successfully. You can now log in."; the user is returned to the sign-in screen.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the password is changed and the user can log in.

Title: Reset Password (Mismatch)
Objectives: Verify the new password and confirmation must match.
Test Steps:
1. Enter mismatched new and confirm passwords.
2. Submit.
Expected Results: Alert: "Passwords do not match"; the request is not sent.
Actual Results: Alert: "Passwords do not match"; the request is not sent.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the reset is blocked when passwords differ.

Title: Reset Password (Too Short)
Objectives: Verify a new password shorter than 8 characters is rejected.
Test Steps:
1. Enter a new password shorter than 8 characters with a matching confirm.
2. Submit.
Expected Results: Alert: "Password must be at least 8 characters and include uppercase, lowercase, a number, and a special character."; the password is not changed.
Actual Results: Alert: "Password must be at least 8 characters and include uppercase, lowercase, a number, and a special character."; the password is not changed.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the short password is rejected.

Title: Reset Password (Not Verified / Expired Token)
Objectives: Verify reset is blocked without a verified, active token.
Prerequisites: No verified token, or the verified token has expired (> 30 min).
Test Steps: 1. Attempt to reset the password without a current verified session.
Expected Results: Server rejects with "Invalid or expired reset token." (or the client shows "Session expired. Please start over." if the verification step was skipped).
Actual Results: Server rejects with "Invalid or expired reset token." (or the client shows "Session expired. Please start over." if the verification step was skipped).
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the reset is rejected without a verified token.

Title: Reset Password (Missing Complexity)
Objectives: Verify a new password lacking complexity is rejected.
Test Steps:
1. Enter an 8+ character password with no uppercase, number, or special character, with a matching confirm.
2. Submit.
Expected Results: Alert: "Password must be at least 8 characters and include uppercase, lowercase, a number, and a special character."; the password is not changed.
Actual Results: Alert: "Password must be at least 8 characters and include uppercase, lowercase, a number, and a special character."; the password is not changed.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the non-complex password is rejected.
